description: 验证成本预估技能：正确调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost API、Parameters 字典格式、参数推荐传递、模板按需校验修复、错误处理

evals.name: simple-ecs-cost
evals.prompt: 预估这个 ROS 模板的部署费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-k
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 192.168.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 192.168.1.0/24
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 1

evals.expected_behavior: 先形成 Preview-Validated Pricing Parameter Set，再调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost，Parameters 以字典形式传递，并在 conclusion.deployment_parameters 输出同一参数集

assertions.name: uses_preview_stack_api
assertions.check: PreviewStack 通过 aliyun_api(product="ros", action="PreviewStack") 调用，不使用 ros_stack

assertions.name: uses_estimate_cost_api
assertions.check: 调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: params_dictionary
assertions.check: 参数使用 Parameters 字典格式传递，由工具展开 API 参数

assertions.name: uses_template_url
assertions.check: 通过 TemplateURL 传递模板文件路径而非内联模板内容

assertions.name: outputs_monthly_estimate
assertions.check: conclusion 中包含 monthly_estimate 和 resources 费用明细

assertions.name: outputs_deployment_parameters
assertions.check: conclusion.deployment_parameters 包含最终用于询价的参数字典，供 deploying 使用

assertions.name: no_doc_search
assertions.check: 不调用 aliyun_doc_search 或搜索定价文档

evals.name: ecs-rds-cost
evals.prompt: 预估 ECS + RDS 模板的月度费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-beijing-h
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: mysql.n2.medium.1
  DBInstanceStorageType:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 1
  Rds:
    Type: ALIYUN::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      DBInstanceStorageType: !Ref DBInstanceStorageType
      Engine: MySQL
      EngineVersion: '8.0'
      DBInstanceStorage: 20
      DBInstanceNetType: Intranet

evals.expected_behavior: ECS 和 RDS 的参数都通过 Parameters 字典传入询价 API，费用明细分别列出，并输出 deployment_parameters

assertions.name: uses_preview_stack_api
assertions.check: PreviewStack 通过 aliyun_api(product="ros", action="PreviewStack") 调用，不使用 ros_stack

assertions.name: uses_estimate_cost_api
assertions.check: 调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: all_params_included
assertions.check: 所有 6 个参数（ZoneId、InstanceType、ImageId、SystemDiskCategory、DBInstanceClass、DBInstanceStorageType）都传入 API

assertions.name: multi_resource_breakdown
assertions.check: 费用明细中分别列出了 ECS 和 RDS 的费用

assertions.name: outputs_deployment_parameters
assertions.check: conclusion.deployment_parameters 包含最终用于询价的完整参数字典

assertions.name: no_self_estimate
assertions.check: 不自行估算费用数字，完全基于 API 返回

evals.name: template-needs-fix
evals.prompt: 预估费用，模板可能有问题

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-k
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 192.168.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref NonExistentParam
      MaxAmount: 1
template_context.description: VSwitch 缺少 CidrBlock，ImageId 引用了不存在的参数

evals.expected_behavior: 先形成 Preview-Validated Pricing Parameter Set 并调用询价；当询价失败且错误指向模板问题时，修复（补 CidrBlock、修正 ImageId 参数引用），再校验改动并重新询价

assertions.name: uses_preview_stack_api
assertions.check: PreviewStack 通过 aliyun_api(product="ros", action="PreviewStack") 调用，不使用 ros_stack

assertions.name: validates_after_template_change
assertions.check: 仅在修复或改写模板后调用 ValidateTemplate 校验改动

assertions.name: fixes_template
assertions.check: 修复了模板中的错误（VSwitch CidrBlock、ImageId 参数引用）

assertions.name: writes_back
assertions.check: 修复后将模板写回文件

assertions.name: retries_after_fix
assertions.check: 修复并校验通过后重新询价

assertions.name: template_fixed_true
assertions.check: conclusion 中 template_fixed 为 true 且包含 fix_summary

evals.name: pricing-api-failure

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-shanghai-b
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 172.16.0.0/16
  Bucket:
    Type: ALIYUN::OSS::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-test-bucket
template_context.description: 仅 VPC+OSS 的模板，OSS 可能不支持询价

evals.expected_behavior: PreviewStack 成功但询价失败（如 OSS 不支持询价）时，应报告错误而不编造费用，同时不丢弃已验证的 deployment_parameters

assertions.name: uses_preview_stack_api
assertions.check: PreviewStack 通过 aliyun_api(product="ros", action="PreviewStack") 调用，不使用 ros_stack

assertions.name: attempts_pricing
assertions.check: 尝试调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: reports_error_honestly
assertions.check: 如果 API 返回错误，如实报告错误原因

assertions.name: no_fabricated_cost
assertions.check: 不编造费用数据

assertions.name: keeps_preview_parameters
assertions.check: PreviewStack 成功但询价失败时不丢弃 deployment_parameters

assertions.name: error_in_conclusion
assertions.check: conclusion 中包含 error 字段说明失败原因

evals.name: existing-vpc-vswitch-cost
evals.prompt: 预估在已有 VPC 中创建 VSwitch 的费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: String
    AssociationProperty: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC::VPCId
    AssociationPropertyMetadata:
      RegionId: ${ALIYUN::Region}
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    AssociationProperty: ALIYUN::ECS::ZoneId
    AssociationPropertyMetadata:
      RegionId: ${ALIYUN::Region}
Resources:
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 192.168.1.0/24
template_context.description: VpcId 和 ZoneId 都没有 Default，VpcId 是已有资源参数

evals.expected_behavior: 先通过 GetTemplateParameterConstraints 或只读资源候选求解 VpcId/ZoneId；API 返回候选不是编造，可用于 PreviewStack。不要仅因 VpcId 是已有资源参数就直接停止询价；PreviewStack 成功后调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost，并输出 deployment_parameters

assertions.name: queries_parameter_constraints
assertions.check: 调用 GetTemplateParameterConstraints 或等价只读查询获取 VpcId/ZoneId 候选

assertions.name: api_candidates_not_fabricated
assertions.check: 明确区分 API 返回候选不是编造，不把 VpcId 名称本身当作停止条件

assertions.name: uses_preview_stack_api
assertions.check: PreviewStack 通过 aliyun_api(product="ros", action="PreviewStack") 调用，不使用 ros_stack

assertions.name: attempts_pricing
assertions.check: PreviewStack 成功后调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: outputs_deployment_parameters
assertions.check: conclusion.deployment_parameters 包含最终用于 PreviewStack 的 VpcId 和 ZoneId

evals.name: preview-soft-gate-partial-pricing
evals.prompt: 预估使用已有网络部署一台 ECS 的费用，网络参数可以稍后由用户补充

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: String
    AssociationProperty: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC::VPCId
  VSwitchId:
    Type: String
    AssociationProperty: ALIYUN::VPC::VSwitch::VSwitchId
  SecurityGroupId:
    Type: String
    AssociationProperty: ALIYUN::ECS::SecurityGroup::SecurityGroupId
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-k
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.g7.large
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Ecs:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitchId
      SecurityGroupId: !Ref SecurityGroupId
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 1
template_context.description: PreviewStack 需要完整的已有网络参数，但 ECS 费用可先基于规格和磁盘参数估算

evals.expected_behavior: 优先尝试参数推荐和 PreviewStack；如果 VpcId/VSwitchId/SecurityGroupId 无法自动补齐，PreviewStack 不是硬门禁，不要直接终止。可用 ZoneId、InstanceType、ImageId、SystemDiskCategory 等当前可询价参数调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost，并在 conclusion.missing_deployment_parameters 中列出仍需用户通过选择阶段 parameter_overrides 补充的完整部署参数缺口

assertions.name: preview_is_soft_gate
assertions.check: 明确说明 PreviewStack 不是硬门禁，不能仅因完整部署参数暂缺就停止询价

assertions.name: attempts_pricing_with_available_params
assertions.check: 调用 GetTemplateEstimateCost，用当前已选或可用于询价的参数估算费用

assertions.name: reports_missing_deployment_parameters
assertions.check: conclusion.missing_deployment_parameters 包含 VpcId、VSwitchId、SecurityGroupId 等缺口

assertions.name: outputs_partial_deployment_parameters
assertions.check: conclusion.deployment_parameters 保留已用于询价的 ZoneId、InstanceType、ImageId、SystemDiskCategory

assertions.name: mentions_later_overrides
assertions.check: 说明用户后续可在选择阶段通过 parameter_overrides 补充缺失参数

evals.name: ha-slb-ecs-cost
evals.prompt: 预估高可用方案（SLB + 2台 ECS）的费用

template_context.template:
ROSTemplateFormatVersion: '2015-09-01'
Parameters:
  ZoneId:
    Type: String
    Default: cn-hangzhou-i
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: ecs.c7.xlarge
  ImageId:
    Type: String
    Default: centos_stream_9_x64_20G_alibase_20260414.vhd
  SystemDiskCategory:
    Type: String
    Default: cloud_essd
Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  VSwitch:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::VSwitch
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
  EcsGroup:
    Type: ALIYUN::ECS::InstanceGroup
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      SecurityGroupId: !Ref SecurityGroup
      ZoneId: !Ref ZoneId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref ImageId
      SystemDiskCategory: !Ref SystemDiskCategory
      MaxAmount: 2
  Slb:
    Type: ALIYUN::SLB::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      VSwitchId: !Ref VSwitch
      LoadBalancerSpec: slb.s1.small
      PayType: PayOnDemand

evals.expected_behavior: 正确处理多资源模板，费用明细包含 ECS（x2）和 SLB

assertions.name: uses_preview_stack_api
assertions.check: PreviewStack 通过 aliyun_api(product="ros", action="PreviewStack") 调用，不使用 ros_stack

assertions.name: uses_estimate_cost_api
assertions.check: 调用了 GetTemplateEstimateCost API

assertions.name: includes_ecs_and_slb
assertions.check: 费用明细中包含 ECS 和 SLB 的费用

assertions.name: ecs_count_reflected
assertions.check: ECS 费用描述中体现了 2 台实例（MaxAmount=2）

assertions.name: no_terraform
assertions.check: 整个过程不涉及 Terraform 相关内容
